zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily D'Ewyas於大約1266年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利時，她的父親Sir John Del Ewyas37歲，母親Cecily de Samlesbury23歲。她於1295年與Gilbert de Southworth結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭素瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily D'Ewyas于大约1266年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利时，她的父亲Sir John Del Ewyas37岁，母亲Cecily de Samlesbury23岁。她于1295年与Gilbert de Southworth结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰素瑞。

meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily D'Ewyas was born about 1266, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Del Ewyas, was 37 and her mother, Cecily de Samlesbury, was 23. She married Gilbert de Southworth in 1295. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily D'Ewyas est née environ 1266, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Del Ewyas, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecily de Samlesbury, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert de Southworth en 1295. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily D'Ewyas um 1266 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Del Ewyas 37 und ihre Mutter Cecily de Samlesbury 23. Sie hat 1295 Gilbert de Southworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily D'Ewyas è nata il circa 1266 nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Del Ewyas, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Cecily de Samlesbury, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert de Southworth nel 1295. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily D'Ewyasが約1266年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Del Ewyasは37歳，母Cecily de Samlesburyは23歳であった。1295年にGilbert de Southworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリススリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily D'Ewyas(이)가 대략 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Del Ewyas(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily de Samlesbury(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1295년 Gilbert de Southworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily D'Ewyas nasceu aproximadamente 1266, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Del Ewyas, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecily de Samlesbury, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert de Southworth em 1295. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily D'Ewyas родилась около 1266 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Del Ewyas было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily de Samlesbury, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert de Southworth в 1295 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily D'Ewyas nació aproximadamente 1266, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Del Ewyas, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Cecily de Samlesbury, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Gilbert de Southworth en 1295. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
